privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated SciNote database records. The project 'CRISPR Assay Development', experiment 'In vitro Cleavage', and task 'Cas9 RNP Preparation' are created directly via SQL commands in setup_task.sh. The expected NEB URL ('https://www.neb.com/products/m0386-cas9-nuclease-s-pyogenes'), Addgene URL ('https://www.addgene.org/42230/'), warning text substring ('Keep enzymes on ice at all times'), and bold text ('Critical:') are all explicitly defined in the task instructions and accurately checked by the verifier.
